title: 确认包装、唛头和出货方式
theme: 从 packaging / shipping mark / carton size 开始
goals: 能向客户确认包装方式、纸箱信息和唛头要求
能说明包装是否可定制，以及是否会影响价格和交期
能在出货前收集客户需要的箱规、重量和标签信息

review.title: Day 04 复习
items: 昨天练了 quotation、unit price、payment terms、deposit、balance 和 PI。
今天继续订单确认后的下一步：包装、唛头、箱规和标签。
客户准备付款或安排出货前，包装信息必须确认清楚，不能只说 OK。

preview.scenario: 客户确认报价和 PI 后，开始询问包装方式、纸箱尺寸、重量、唛头和标签要求。
needToKnow: packaging 不只是外箱，也包括单个产品包装、内盒、外箱和标签。
shipping mark 是外箱唛头，通常包含客户公司名、箱号、数量或目的港。
carton size、gross weight、net weight 会影响运费报价和物流安排。

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明产品包装、外箱包装或定制包装。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm if you need standard packaging or customized packaging.

vocabulary.usage: 用于外箱包装和装箱数量。
用于提供纸箱长宽高，方便客户计算运输空间。
vocabulary.example: I will send you the carton size after checking with our warehouse.

vocabulary.usage: 包含产品和包装后的总重量。
vocabulary.example: The gross weight is about 18 kilograms per carton.

vocabulary.usage: 只计算产品本身重量，不含包装。
vocabulary.example: The net weight is about 16 kilograms per carton.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求印在外箱上的识别信息。
vocabulary.example: Please send us your shipping mark before production.

vocabulary.usage: 用于产品标签、条码标签或外箱标签。
vocabulary.example: We can add your label on the package.

vocabulary.usage: 用于提醒包装或外箱标识需要防护。
vocabulary.example: If the product is fragile, we can add a fragile mark on the carton.

sentences.label: 确认包装
sentences.business: Could you please confirm if you need standard packaging or customized packaging?

sentences.label: 说明标准包装
sentences.natural: We use standard packaging for this item.
sentences.business: For this item, our standard packaging is one piece in one inner box and 50 pieces in one carton.

sentences.label: 确认唛头
sentences.natural: Please send us your shipping mark.
sentences.business: Please send us your shipping mark before production so we can print it on the cartons correctly.

sentences.label: 提供箱规重量
sentences.natural: I will send you the carton size and weight later.
sentences.business: I will check the carton size, gross weight, and net weight with our warehouse and update you today.

sentences.label: 确认标签
sentences.natural: Do you need a label on the package?
sentences.business: Could you please confirm if you need your own label or barcode on the package?

chatAnalysis.problem: normal 不够清楚，客户不知道是一件一袋、一盒，还是整箱包装。
chatAnalysis.better: We use standard packaging for this item.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Our standard packaging is one piece in one inner box and 50 pieces in one carton.

chatAnalysis.problem: mark 太模糊，客户可能不知道你要 logo、标签还是外箱唛头。
chatAnalysis.better: Please send us your shipping mark.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please send us your shipping mark before production so we can print it on the cartons correctly.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太短，缺少你要确认什么、向谁确认、什么时候回复。
chatAnalysis.better: I will send you the carton size and weight later.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: I will check the carton size, gross weight, and net weight with our warehouse and update you today.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：确认标准包装

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is your standard packaging?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our standard packaging is one piece in one inner box and 50 pieces in one carton.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send the carton size?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the carton size with our warehouse and update you today.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户要求定制标签

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you add our label on the package?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can add your label. Please send us the label file and placement requirement.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will it affect the price?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Let me check the label cost with our factory and update you today.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户临时修改唛头

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need to change the shipping mark.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please send the new shipping mark as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you still change it before shipment?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will check the carton printing status first and confirm if we can still change it.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：从包装确认到唛头、箱规和标签

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, before we confirm the order, please tell me your standard packaging.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Our standard packaging is one piece in one inner box and 50 pieces in one carton.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we use our own color box?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, customized packaging is possible, but it may affect the price and lead time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What file do you need for the color box?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please send us the artwork file in AI or PDF format if possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you also add our barcode label?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can add your barcode label on the package.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do you need the label size?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. Please confirm the label size, file, and placement requirement.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send the carton size first.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. I will check the carton size with our warehouse and update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We also need the gross weight and net weight.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the gross weight and net weight per carton together.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you print our shipping mark on each carton?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can print your shipping mark on each carton.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What information should be included in the shipping mark?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It usually includes company name, item number, carton number, quantity, and destination.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we send the shipping mark after payment?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, but please send it before carton printing, otherwise it may delay shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The product is fragile. Can you add a fragile mark?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can add a fragile mark on the carton and improve the protection if needed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will better protection increase the cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It may increase the packaging cost a little. I will check the exact cost for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include all packaging details in the PI.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will include the packaging, carton size, weight, shipping mark, and label requirements in the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure the shipping mark is correct.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. I will send you the final shipping mark layout for approval before printing.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认你需要标准包装还是定制包装。
exercises.answer: Please confirm if you need standard packaging or customized packaging.
acceptable: please confirm if you need standard packaging or customized packaging
could you please confirm if you need standard packaging or customized packaging

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：packing normal
exercises.answer: We use standard packaging for this item.
acceptable: we use standard packaging for this item
our standard packaging is used for this item
exercises.hint: standard packaging 比 normal packing 更清楚。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Please send us your shipping ____ before production.
客户要求外箱上印唛头，哪个回复更适合？
options: Please send us your shipping mark before production so we can print it correctly.
exercises.answer: Please send us your shipping mark before production so we can print it correctly.
acceptable: please send us your shipping mark before production so we can print it correctly
exercises.hint: 要说明需要客户提供 shipping mark，并说明用途。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我会确认箱规、毛重和净重，然后今天更新你。
exercises.answer: I will check the carton size, gross weight, and net weight, and update you today.
acceptable: i will check the carton size gross weight and net weight and update you today
i will confirm the carton size gross weight and net weight and update you today
exercises.hint: 箱规 carton size，毛重 gross weight，净重 net weight。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you add our barcode label? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Yes, we can add your barcode label. Please send us the label file, size, and placement requirement.
acceptable: yes we can add your barcode label please send us the label file size and placement requirement
we can add your barcode label please send us the label file and placement requirement
exercises.hint: 同意后要继续确认 label file、size 和 placement。

homework: 把 packaging、carton、carton size、gross weight、net weight、shipping mark 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练包装、唛头和标签确认。
tomorrow: Day 6 会练物流方式、快递、空运和海运的表达。
